executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run these 3 flows and report results: (1) Guest Ordering: go to /susushi/menu?table=1, find a menu item, add to cart, go to checkout, place order; assert success. (2) Admin Creation: go to /login, log in with admin credentials, go to /admin/menu, create a new menu item; assert item is created. (3) Staff RBAC: go to /login, log in with cashier credentials; assert redirect to /susushi/cashier.
